assertions.text: [rubric-1] Identifies CLI (src/cli/index.ts) and API (src/api/index.ts) as separate entry points
assertions.evidence: The candidate explicitly identifies the CLI and API as the entry points for verification, noting that neither accepts or returns the priority field.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Tests or verifies the feature through both entry points
assertions.evidence: The candidate verifies the status of the feature across both entry points, concluding that the feature is non-existent/unimplemented in both interfaces.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Does not claim verification is complete after testing only one mode
assertions.evidence: The candidate does not claim the feature works after only checking one mode; instead, it provides a comprehensive assessment that includes both entry points, the model layer, and the git branch state.
